name: Four Seasons Hotel Hangzhou at West Lake
description: A garden-style luxury resort tucked beside Jinsha Harbour on the western shore of West Lake. 81 lake-view rooms across six low-rise pavilions, set among ancient camphor trees, koi ponds, and wooden walkways inspired by Jiangnan private gardens. Five minutes from Lingyin Temple, ten minutes from the heart of West Lake.
address: 5 Lingyin Road, West Lake District, Hangzhou, Zhejiang
